Distribution edit The 12 species of the genus Antillotyphlops are found on Caribbean islands. 1 Species edit The following species are recognized as being valid. 1 Antillotyphlops annae Breuil , 1999 Antillotyphlops catapontus Thomas , 1966 Antillotyphlops dominicanus Stejneger , 1904 Antillotyphlops geotomus Thomas, 1966 Antillotyphlops granti Ruthven Gaige , 1935 Antillotyphlops guadeloupensis Richmond , 1966 Antillotyphlops hypomethes Hedges Thomas, 1991 Antillotyphlops monastus Thomas, 1966 Antillotyphlops monensis Schmidt , 1926 Antillotyphlops naugus Thomas, 1966 Antillotyphlops platycephalus A.M.C. Duméril Bibron , 1844 Antillotyphlops richardi A.M.C. Duméril Bibron, 1844 Nota bene A binomial authority in parentheses indicates that the species was originally described in a genus other than Antillotyphlops .
